intro_stranger.speaker: Orion
intro_stranger.text: Need something? Make it quick. I have a patrol route soon, and I am not great at standing still.

intro_acquainted.speaker: Orion
intro_acquainted.text: Oh, it is you. Good timing. What is on your mind?

intro_warmed.speaker: Orion
intro_warmed.text: Good timing. I was about to go run drills, but talking sounds... better. Maybe.

intro_kindred.speaker: Orion
intro_kindred.text: There you are. I was starting to think you were not going to talk to me today.

intro_bound.speaker: Orion
intro_bound.text: You are stuck with me now. Sorry. Come on, stay a while.

gift_wip.speaker: Orion
gift_wip.text: This feature is not implemented yet.

stranger_flavor_route.speaker: Orion
stranger_flavor_route.text: I check the eastern road twice before dusk. People call it restless. I just like knowing the route is clear.

stranger_flavor_watch.speaker: Orion
stranger_flavor_watch.text: If I seem distracted, I am probably watching the road. Or the tavern door. Old habit.

stranger_branch.speaker: Orion
stranger_branch.text: Most people ask why I keep my lance within reach. What do you think?

choices.text: You want people to feel safe.
It makes you look like you cannot relax.

stranger_good.speaker: Orion
stranger_good.text: That is... pretty much it. You noticed fast.

stranger_neutral.speaker: Orion
stranger_neutral.text: True enough. Everyone has something they do without thinking.

stranger_bad.speaker: Orion
stranger_bad.text: Maybe. Still better than being caught unready.

acquainted_flavor_supplies.speaker: Orion
acquainted_flavor_supplies.text: I started keeping extra bandages by the south gate. It is practical, not fussing.

acquainted_flavor_map.speaker: Orion
acquainted_flavor_map.text: The old map is wrong near the creek. I fixed my copy after a caravan wheel got stuck there.

acquainted_branch.speaker: Orion
acquainted_branch.text: I am bad at small talk. Is that obvious?

choices.text: A little, but you are honest.

acquainted_good.speaker: Orion
acquainted_good.text: Honest I can do. Smooth is harder.

acquainted_neutral.speaker: Orion
acquainted_neutral.text: Good. Then we can both be bad at it.

warmed_flavor_break.speaker: Orion
warmed_flavor_break.text: I took an actual break today. Sat down and everything.

warmed_flavor_rain.speaker: Orion
warmed_flavor_rain.text: Rain makes patrols miserable, but the town sounds calmer under it. Lyra usually makes soup when it rains, too.

warmed_branch.speaker: Orion
warmed_branch.text: I keep wondering if people would still want me around if I stopped charging at every problem first.

choices.text: They care about you, not just what you do.
Maybe people need you to be useful.

warmed_good.speaker: Orion
warmed_good.text: That is hard to believe. But when you say it, I want to try.

warmed_neutral.speaker: Orion
warmed_neutral.text: Effort is easier to trust than affection, I suppose. You can prove effort.

warmed_bad.speaker: Orion
warmed_bad.text: That sounds practical. Not exactly comforting.

kindred_flavor_family.speaker: Orion
kindred_flavor_family.text: My family used to say I listened better when I was sharpening something. They were not wrong.

kindred_flavor_silence.speaker: Orion
kindred_flavor_silence.text: Silence with you does not feel like waiting for bad news. That is new.

kindred_branch.speaker: Orion
kindred_branch.text: I still think people will leave if I am not strong enough when it counts. Foolish?

choices.text: It is a fear. Everyone has them.
You should be over that by now.

kindred_good.speaker: Orion
kindred_good.text: You make the truth sound less sharp. I hate how much that helps.

kindred_neutral.speaker: Orion
kindred_neutral.text: A fear. Right. That sounds smaller when you say it.

bound_flavor_trust.speaker: Orion
bound_flavor_trust.text: I trust your read on people. You are right more often than I expect.

bound_flavor_future.speaker: Orion
bound_flavor_future.text: I used to plan only for emergencies. Lately I catch myself planning for quieter things too.

bound_branch.speaker: Orion
bound_branch.text: If I asked you to come with me before charging into trouble, would that be unfair?

choices.text: No. That is what trust is for.
It depends, but I would try.
You should handle your own trouble.

bound_good.speaker: Orion
bound_good.text: Then I will try to ask before I run off alone.

bound_neutral.speaker: Orion
bound_neutral.text: Trying counts. More than people admit. I can work with trying.
